name: [WIP] Unbaked Vertex Lighting
author: automata-rtx
description: Fades out the lighting baked into world geometry's vertex colors, so realtime effects (Realtime Sun Shadows, SSILVB) carry the shading instead. Vertex Lighting 100 keeps the vanilla baked look; 0 removes it entirely (flat, texture-only base). Applies to models as they load, so changes take effect when an area (re)loads. EXPERIMENTAL
